I love this game for the variety of games... but everytime I try to go to a public lobby it's only me In the lobby and it gets boring just by myself.
Stop making us donate and spend are money in buddles and making us wait so much time to get a knife?🙄

developer_response.body: Hi, we’d like to clarify that your review contains incorrect information. The game does not require any payments, donations, or purchases to progress or unlock items like knives. Everything in the game can be earned for free through regular gameplay. We understand some aspects may take time, but no part of the game forces players to spend money. Please be fair and accurate when leaving reviews, as misleading comments can negatively impact other players’ perceptions. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Nice chill game to play with friends

very fun and unique  it is a great game to play with friends there is also a big variety of cosmetics to get and lots of gamemodes like the zero gravity space soccer , the only up, the airsoft, horror and laser tag there is also customizable colors and names and even public rooms and private rooms where u can just be with ur friends and not people yelling the player model and cosmetics also looks amazing and unique and the graphics of the game are a 10/10 there is also a vip/trusted user room with tons of cool features
Retrust Is One Of My Favorite Games and The New Revamp is very impressive! I Can 100% Say That I’m A Proud Moderator For This Game(Diamond)! Well Done!

reviews.review_title: This game is better than Gorilla Tag.
reviews.review_description: I know lots of people say "This certain game is better than Gorilla Tag" but none of them actually take the cake. This game is so good I can't even describe it. The Graphics are insane, everything is perfect. The game has 2 great owners, and a nice community who is willing to help people out. This game even features laser tag, YES FRIKN LASER TAG! If you aren't playing this game, what are you doing? DOWNLOAD NOW!

reviews.review_title: Amazing Game! (Do NOT ask for mod)
reviews.review_description: As a moderator for this game i really like it, and no it's not because i'm a mod or anything. This game is actually really unique and cool! There's so many possibilities in there and i highly recommend checking it out! - Zkript
The quality is amazing!
